Gwen, 8, 70, 15 So the original order is Louis, Bernard, Vincent, Gwen. The question says we delete Bernard. That means we remove the second entry. After deletion, the remaining penguins would be Louis, Vincent, Gwen. The order should stay the same unless specified otherwise. The last penguin in this new list would be Gwen. Let me check the options again. Option D is Gwen. So the answer should be D. Wait, but maybe I should double-check.
